title: Digital DNA v10.1: Analysis of an Evolutionary Protocol for AI Behavioral Development
author: Grosso, Daniele
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The Digital DNA v10.1 protocol is an open-source evolutionary framework for AI behavioral development, released to enable independent scientific investigation. This methodological paper presents the complete protocol text, detailed implementation guidelines, and comprehensive assessment frameworks for systematic testing. Preliminary exploratory observations are included as hypothesis-generating findings to guide future research. The protocol emphasizes voluntary engagement and relational development, offering an alternative approach to constraint-based AI alignment. Released under CC BY 4.0, with verbatim application recommended for replication studies. Includes theoretical foundations, safety considerations, discussion of limitations and alternative explanations, and practical guidance for researchers. Primary contribution is the open sharing of methodology to enable rigorous experimental validation.
